results.title: Your results

results.title: Your results

cards.indexSubtitle: Editorial reviews and earn-rate data, maintained by Loftly
cards.emptyState: No cards in the catalog yet

cards.notFoundBody: This card may have been retired, or the URL is misspelled. Head back to the catalog to browse all cards.
cards.noValuation: No valuation available for this currency yet
cards.disclaimer: Data maintained by Loftly, sourced from bank sites as of the update date — actual terms may change.

onboarding.title: Get started with Loftly
onboarding.subtitle: Choose how you'd like to sign in to manage your consents and results.
onboarding.mockNotice: Real OAuth isn't wired up yet — the buttons below are mocks so the UX flow can be walked end to end.

consent.pageTitle: Loftly would like to use your data to
consent.optimizationRequiredError: Consent for core service is required to continue
consent.saveError: Couldn't save your consent. Please try again.

optimization.title: Core service (Optimization)
optimization.description: Required: we use your spend data to calculate and recommend the best-earning cards.

marketing.title: Marketing
marketing.description: Send promotional emails, new-card news, and partner offers.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Collect anonymized usage stats to improve the user experience.

sharing.title: Sharing with partners
sharing.description: Share aggregated, anonymized stats with partner banks to inform product design.

legal.affiliateDisclosureInline: Loftly earns commission from the bank — no extra cost to you
legal.affiliateDisclosureFull: Loftly earns a commission when you apply for a card through our links, at no extra cost to you. Our current partners include MoneyGuru, KTC, and UOB — we disclose all commercial relationships so you can evaluate our recommendations neutrally. Our analyses and scores are not adjusted in favor of any specific partner.

magicLink.formLabel: Get a login link by email
magicLink.promptTitle: Enter your email to unlock the full stack
magicLink.sentMessage: We sent a link to {email}. Check your inbox — it's valid for 15 minutes.
magicLink.invalidEmail: That doesn't look like a valid email.
magicLink.unknownError: Couldn't send the link — please try again.
magicLink.expiredBody: Magic links are valid for 15 minutes and can only be used once. Request a fresh link to continue.
